title: Mobile API Integration - Replace mock data with real API
description: Connect mobile app to real API: fetch business config (theme, name) by subdomain, load catalog (categories, bases, modifiers, presets), submit orders. Replace all hardcoded mock data. Handle loading states and errors. TDD: test API calls, loading/error states, subdomain parsing, theme application, catalog rendering from API data.
close_reason: Phase 4 implementation complete - Mobile: 122 tests, API: 907 tests

title: POS Integration & Source of Truth - Epic
description: Transform Drink-UX into the source of truth for coffee shop menu management, syncing TO POS systems (starting with Square). Enables the core product vision: inverted drink ordering where customers build what they want and discover what it's called. See docs/plans/2026-01-10-pos-integration-design.md for full design.
close_reason: All 16 implementation tasks complete + comprehensive documentation added

title: POS Adapter - Square OAuth, catalog read/write, orders
description: Implement POSAdapter interface and SquareAdapter: OAuth connection flow, importCatalog(), pushItem(), pushModifier(), updateItem(), createOrder(), getPaymentLink(), getOrderStatus(). Store credentials securely. TDD: test OAuth flow, catalog import parsing, item creation/update, order submission, error handling for API failures, rate limiting, auth expiry.
close_reason: Implemented POSAdapter interface, SquareAdapter (OAuth, importCatalog, push methods), MockPOSAdapter, encryption utilities, and POS routes - 123 passing tests total

title: POSAdapter interface & types
close_reason: Implemented POSAdapter interface, types, SquareAdapter skeleton, and factory function with 6 passing tests

title: Subscription Gate - Square billing and account states
description: Implement subscription management via Square Subscriptions API: subscription plans, checkout flow, webhook handling for status changes. Gate live storefront behind active subscription. Handle account states (setup_complete -> active -> paused). Show 'Coming Soon' for non-subscribed businesses. TDD: test subscription creation, webhook processing, state transitions, storefront gating, grace periods.
close_reason: Subscription Gate feature implemented with 1303 passing API tests

title: Auth System - Business owner signup, login, sessions
description: Implement auth for business owners: signup flow (email, password, business name), email verification, login, password reset, session management with secure HTTP-only cookies. Create User model linkage to Business. TDD: test signup validation, login success/failure, session persistence, password reset flow, rate limiting.
close_reason: Fully implemented with TDD. Auth: 168 tests (password, AuthService, session, rateLimit, auth routes). Catalog Sync: 18+ tests (catalogDiff, CatalogSyncService, catalogSync routes). Shared UI: 135 tests (DrinkVisualizer, LayeredCup, CategorySelector, TypeSelector, ModificationPanel, DrinkVisual). Total: 482 tests passing.

title: Theme Application - Dynamic theming from business config
description: Extend existing theme system: fetch business theme from API on mobile load, apply colors/logo as CSS variables, handle theme loading states, fallback to defaults. Admin preview of theme changes. TDD: test theme fetch, CSS variable application, fallback behavior, logo rendering.
close_reason: Phase 4 implementation complete - Mobile: 122 tests, API: 907 tests

title: Error Handling and Edge Cases
description: Comprehensive error handling: sync failures (retry, clear messages, auth expiry prompts), order failures (payment declined, POS unreachable, item unavailable), POS downtime detection (health checks, 'temporarily unavailable' message). Edge cases: cart persistence across refreshes, offline indicator, invalid/old slugs (404), setup_complete state ('Coming soon'), ejected shops ('No longer available'). TDD: test all error scenarios, edge cases, graceful degradation.
close_reason: Completed Payment Integration (1099 API tests) and Error Handling (367 mobile tests)

title: SquareAdapter push methods (pushItem, pushModifier, updateItem)
close_reason: Implemented pushItem, pushModifier, updateItem with optimistic locking - 18 passing tests

title: Shared UI Components - Move drink builder to shared package
description: Extract drink builder components from mobile to @drink-ux/shared (or new @drink-ux/ui package): DrinkVisualizer, LayeredCup, CategorySelector, TypeSelector, ModificationPanel. Ensure both mobile and admin can import and use them. TDD: test component rendering in isolation, prop handling, visual output consistency.
close_reason: Fully implemented with TDD. Auth: 168 tests (password, AuthService, session, rateLimit, auth routes). Catalog Sync: 18+ tests (catalogDiff, CatalogSyncService, catalogSync routes). Shared UI: 135 tests (DrinkVisualizer, LayeredCup, CategorySelector, TypeSelector, ModificationPanel, DrinkVisual). Total: 482 tests passing.

title: Admin Menu Builder - Add/edit items via drink builder UI
description: Implement menu administration using shared drink builder components: Add item flow (build drink -> name -> price -> save), Edit item (open in builder -> adjust -> save), Delete/deactivate items. Category management (create, reorder, delete). Ingredients manager (bases, modifiers with availability toggles and pricing). TDD: test CRUD operations, validation, optimistic UI updates, error handling.
close_reason: Phase 3 implementation complete - 907 tests passing

title: SquareAdapter OAuth methods
close_reason: Implemented SquareAdapter OAuth methods (getAuthorizationUrl, exchangeCodeForTokens, refreshTokens) with 14 passing tests

title: Payment Integration - Square Web Payments SDK
description: Integrate Square Web Payments SDK for payment handoff: card info goes directly to Square (never touches Drink-UX servers), handle payment confirmation, update order status. Link payment to POS order. TDD: test payment initiation, success/failure callbacks, order status updates, declined card handling, timeout scenarios.
close_reason: Completed Payment Integration (1099 API tests) and Error Handling (367 mobile tests)

title: SquareAdapter importCatalog
close_reason: Implemented SquareAdapter importCatalog with pagination support, parsing items/modifiers/categories - 13 passing tests

title: Order Submission Flow - Customer to POS
description: Implement full order flow: customer builds drink, add to cart (localStorage), checkout form (name, contact), submit order to API, API creates order in POS via adapter, return confirmation with pickup code. Poll order status from POS, display updates to customer. Handle guest checkout. TDD: test cart persistence, order creation, POS submission, status polling, payment handoff, error scenarios (POS down, payment failed, item unavailable).
close_reason: Phase 5 complete - API: 982 tests, Mobile: 209 tests. Full order flow implemented.

title: Admin Account Management - Profile, settings, billing
description: Implement account management pages: business profile (name, slug, contact info), branding settings (theme colors, logo upload), POS connection status and re-sync option, subscription/billing management link to Square. TDD: test profile updates, logo upload, theme preview, validation.
close_reason: Phase 3 implementation complete - 907 tests passing

title: Catalog Sync Service - On-demand publish to POS
description: Implement sync logic: compare local catalog to POS state, push new items, update changed items, mark deleted items inactive (non-destructive). Store posItemId/posModifierId mappings. Track lastSyncedAt. Show pending changes count, sync status, and clear error messages in admin. TDD: test diff calculation, create/update/deactivate flows, error recovery, partial sync handling, conflict resolution (Drink-UX wins).
close_reason: Fully implemented with TDD. Auth: 168 tests (password, AuthService, session, rateLimit, auth routes). Catalog Sync: 18+ tests (catalogDiff, CatalogSyncService, catalogSync routes). Shared UI: 135 tests (DrinkVisualizer, LayeredCup, CategorySelector, TypeSelector, ModificationPanel, DrinkVisual). Total: 482 tests passing.

title: Multi-tenancy - Subdomain routing and tenant isolation
description: Implement subdomain-based multi-tenancy: wildcard subdomain routing (*.drink-ux.com), tenant extraction from request, business config lookup by slug, API tenant validation on all requests. Mobile app fetches config on load based on subdomain. TDD: test subdomain parsing, tenant isolation, invalid slug handling, API authorization per tenant.
close_reason: Phase 3 implementation complete - 907 tests passing

title: Database Schema - Business, Catalog, Order models
description: Create Prisma models for: Business (id, name, slug, theme, posConnection, subscriptionStatus, accountState), Category, Base (with posItemId mapping), Modifier (milk/syrup/topping types), Preset (named drinks), Order (with posOrderId). Includes migrations and generated client. TDD: test model relationships, constraints, and CRUD operations.
close_reason: Closed

title: MockPOSAdapter for TDD
close_reason: Implemented MockPOSAdapter with configurable responses, error simulation, and call tracking - 19 passing tests

title: Admin Ejection Tool - Disconnect from Drink-UX
description: Implement first-class ejection feature: prominent 'Disconnect' option in settings, confirmation flow explaining what happens (POS items stay, sync stops), set account state to ejected, disable storefront. Option to 'Start over' (re-run onboarding). Preserve data for potential return. TDD: test ejection flow, state transition, storefront disable, data preservation, re-onboarding.
close_reason: Phase 3 implementation complete - 907 tests passing

title: Encryption utilities for token storage
close_reason: Implemented encryption utilities with AES-256-GCM, 17 passing tests

title: POS routes for OAuth callback
close_reason: Implemented POS OAuth routes (authorize, callback, providers) with 11 passing tests

title: Admin Onboarding Wizard
description: Build onboarding wizard flow: Step 1 POS OAuth connection, Step 2 path selection (Import/Template/Fresh), Step 3 catalog setup per path, Step 4 branding and theme, Step 5 review and sync preview. Handle account states (onboarding -> setup_complete). TDD: test wizard navigation, path branching, validation at each step, state persistence across refreshes, OAuth callback handling.
close_reason: Phase 3 implementation complete - 907 tests passing
